ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., social, biological) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the node belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the node, stored in JSON format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the node is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the link belongs to */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes of the link, stored in JSON format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the link is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exploration_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the metric belongs to */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn or time step of the exploration */,
  "pct_nodes_explored" REAL /* Percentage of nodes explored */,
  "pct_links_explored" REAL /* Percentage of links explored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metric is the final recorded metric for that turn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exploration_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_novelty_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the score belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the score belongs to */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn or time step of the exploration */,
  "novelty_score" REAL /* Novelty score of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the score is the final recorded score for that turn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_novelty_scores_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_novelty_scores_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_novelty_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the score belongs to */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link the score belongs to */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn or time step of the exploration */,
  "novelty_score" REAL /* Novelty score of the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last updated */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the score is the final recorded score for that turn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_novelty_scores_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_novelty_scores_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this is the current version of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_versions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
